ExtraProperties.Name: InspectionsInspectorStaticText
ExtraProperties.Text:
I certify that this inspection is complete, any measures needing corrections have been remedied, and all installed measures meet the CSD program requirements and are accurately represented. 

FOR CSI LOW-INCOME THERMAL INCENTIVE ONLY: The occupant named above qualified for weatherization LIHEAP (Low Income Home Weatherization Assistance Program) and/or LIWP (Low Income Weatherization Program) based on household income, which was certified to be at or below 200% of State Median Income. Additionally, the property at which the solar thermal system has been installed meets one of the resale restrictions as stated in the current CSI Thermal Handbook.

ExtraProperties.Name: InspectionsClientCertifications
ExtraProperties.Text: I agree to allow any workmanship corrections described above to be made upon request of the agency and by appointment.
